review.subject: New reasons prevent pages from being indexed on site heartwoodcraft.me
review.summary: Google Search Console flagged new indexing errors on heartwoodcraft.me that are preventing pages from appearing in search results.
review.urgency_reason: Indexing failure on the primary business website is a meaningful SEO state change that warrants a look.

review.subject: New reasons prevent pages in a sitemap from being indexed on site https://iheartwoodcraft.com/
review.summary: Google Search Console flagged separate sitemap indexing errors on iheartwoodcraft.com, a distinct property from the heartwoodcraft.me issue.
review.urgency_reason: Affects a second business web property with its own indexing problems; both sites need attention.

review.subject: Your receipt from DATAx #2727-5170

review.urgency_reason: Finance receipt with attachment from an active business service; tagged action and flagged by Eric's own rules.

review.subject: May ARTS Marathon Day 8
review.summary: Day 8 update in a recurring ARTS Marathon series from Drew Clark via Gmail, with an attachment; most recent entry from this sender in the window.
review.urgency_reason: Real person sending a series email with attachment; surfacing only this most recent entry, Day 7 is in noise.

review.subject: Weekly digest for Thu, Apr 30 2026
review.summary: Weekly activity digest from the Tactical Household community on Skool, a platform Eric subscribes to via his personal Proton account.
review.urgency_reason: Legitimate community subscription Eric chose; digest format makes it worth a glance rather than noise.

review.subject: Your caller ID name "Heartwood Craft" has been approved
review.summary: Quo/OpenPhone confirmed that the business caller ID name 'Heartwood Craft' has been approved and is now active for outbound calls.
review.urgency_reason: Positive state change on the business phone system Eric uses; no action needed but confirms a pending setup task is resolved.

review.subject: Your statement is available
review.summary: Bank of America monthly statement is ready to view; tagged finance and flagged as work-related in Eric's taxonomy.
review.urgency_reason: Financial account statement worth checking for business reconciliation; flagged by Eric's own tagging rules.

review.subject: Your Meta ads receipt (Account ID: 1891243818000745)
review.summary: Most recent Meta Ads billing receipt for account 1891243818000745; nine older identical receipts from the same account are consolidated into the noise bucket.
review.urgency_reason: Active ad spend confirmation surfaced once as the most recent entry; the high-volume receipt stream suggests frequent billing cycles worth monitoring.

review.subject: Ordered: "SIMPERAC GCV160 Carburetor..."

review.subject: Item relisted: Eversharp Luxury 707 Symphony Fountain Pen 14K Gold Nib.

review.subject: Free Webinars in May and June
